mapper.select: SELECT id, ecr_inspect_date, ecr_inspect_person, ecr_inspect_item, ecr_inspect_result, ecr_problem_desc, ecr_measure, ecr_handler, ecr_factory, ecr_reserve_1, ecr_reserve_2, ecr_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_record

SELECT id, ecr_inspect_date, ecr_inspect_person, ecr_inspect_item, ecr_inspect_result, ecr_problem_desc, ecr_measure, ecr_handler, ecr_factory, ecr_reserve_1, ecr_reserve_2, ecr_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_record
